name: Baked Lobster Savannah
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Locke-Ober, Boston, MA
Preparation Time: 1:00
NOTE: If you are using lobsters smaller than three pounds each, you will need enough smaller lobsters to produce a total of about 8 cups of meat after boiling and cooling.
STEP ONE: The Sauce - Heat butter until melted in a large saucepan. Add mushrooms and green peppers. Cook until tender. Stir in paprika, sherry, and blend well. Bring to a simmer.
STEP TWO: The Lobster - Dice the lobsters into large pieces. Remove the intestinal vein and stomach sac before dicing. Place diced lobster meat into the sauce and simmer slowly for 10 minutes. Divide the mixture evenly and spoon back into the lobster shells. Dust with grated Parmesan cheese and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes. Serve.
